prompt: Convert the scene found in the image into night scene, and people standing at each levels cheering for the singer taken from the point of view of this angle
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to transform the bright, daytime interior into a dramatic night scene. Change the ambient lighting to artificial sources, creating atmospheric shadows and highlights on the multi-level, curved wooden balconies. The skylights at the top should reflect a dark night. On each visible curved balcony level, add a dense crowd of people standing along the railings, facing inwards towards the central lower area, actively cheering. Introduce a single singer performing on a brightly lit stage within the central circular opening at the very bottom of the image, maintaining the original high-angle, top-down perspective.
objects: Dense crowd of people standing along the railings on each visible curved balcony level
Central circular opening at the very bottom of the image
